title: Digital Marketing Specialist
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or higher (Electronics / ME / Telecom / CS preferred)
Native speaker of German, French, Spanish, or Portuguese
Familiarity with major local marketing platforms
matched_skills: Bachelor's degree or higher (MBA, Leuphana University)
1–3 years overseas marketing experience (Futu Holdings PMM 2022–2023; Leyard Europe PMM 2020–2021)
Familiarity with major local marketing platforms (HubSpot, Google Analytics)
Growth & conversion focus (KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
Self-motivated / goal-oriented (implied by PMM track record)
missing_skills: Native speaker of German, French, Spanish, or Portuguese — HARD BLOCKER: Boru's German is B2 (learner level), not native; no native proficiency in any of the other listed languages
core_responsibilities: Develop effective marketing strategies aligned with monthly goals, tailored to local channels
Produce multilingual content (service promotions, technical docs, case studies, social media, emails)
Build and manage KOL and content creator relationships to ensure positive ROI
Coordinate and optimise local SEM campaigns based on conversion funnel analysis
Deploy SEO-driven content and collaborate with design/dev teams on landing pages and tracking
recommended_emphasis: Multi-market promotion experience across EMEA and Asia — most transferable to the local-channel focus
ROI reporting and KPI dashboards — aligns with the conversion-funnel and ROI mandate
Sales collateral and content development — closest proxy to content production responsibilities
HubSpot and Google Analytics proficiency — platform familiarity signals
Cross-functional influence with design/dev teams — mirrors landing page collaboration requirement
